channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Arnold, Robinson run for more than 100 yards as Oklahoma stuns No. 7 Alabama 24-3
item.description: Xavier Robinson ran for career highs of 107 yards and two touchdowns, and Oklahoma stunned No. 7 Alabama 24-3 to become bowl eligible and deal a severe blow to the Crimson Tide’s chances of receiving a College Football Playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: Cliff Brunt, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Penguins' Crosby scores 600th NHL goal
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Sidney Crosby would’ve liked his 600th NHL goal to come in a win Crosby became the 21sth player to reach the mark when scored in the second period of the Pittsburgh Penguins' 6-1 loss to the Utah Hockey Club on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: On special night, Sharks blow third-period lead in latest loss
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks face Buffalo Sabres on Joe Thornton's special night at SAP Center to start four-game homestand
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Jason Kelce chugs beers during eventful visit to Appalachian State tailgate
item.description: Jason Kelce once again put his talent on full display. Before Appalachian State kicked off against James Madison, the retired NFL star chugged beers and interacted with fans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: After fans storm field early, No. 21 Arizona St stops Hail Mary try for 28-23 win over No. 14 BYU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Cam Skattebo was the workhorse once again for Arizona State, carrying the Sun Devils on his back by rushing for 147 yards and three touchdowns. His reward was a well-earned celebration with fans. Twice. Skattebo had another big game, Sam Leavitt threw for 247 yards and No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Devin Neal scores 4 times, Kansas beats No. 16 Colorado 37-21 as Buffs' Big 12 title hopes take hit
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Devin Neal ran for 207 yards and three touchdowns, caught four passes for 80 yards and another score, and led Kansas to a 37-21 victory over No. 16 Colorado on Saturday that dealt a big blow to the Buffaloes' hopes of playing for the Big 12 title.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU comeback falls short at ASU, 28-23
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU's offense took too late to get going, and the Cougars' chances at a Big 12 Championship took a serious hit with a 28-23 loss at Arizona State Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Same glitz and glamour for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, and perhaps another Verstappen championship
item.description: Max Verstappen returned to the Las Vegas Grand Prix as the defending winner of the Sin City spectacle and a fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship well within his reach.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 24 Illinois stuns Rutgers on Bryant's 40-yard TD reception with 4 seconds left
item.description: PISCATAWAY, N.J. (AP) — Trailing by one at the 40-yard line with 14 seconds to play and no timeouts, Illinois coach Bret Bielema sent in a play known as “church” to Luke Altmyer. The quarterback was to hit a receiver who was to go to the ground immediately.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Argentina's Racing wins its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1
item.description: ASUNCION, Paraguay (AP) — Gaston Martirena and Adrian Martinez scored first-half goals as Argentina's Racing won its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1 in the final on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TEXANS NEWSLETTER: Taking on the Titans
item.description: Hey guys, it’s Ari Alexander - back from vacation back in time to watch the Texans pull away from the Cowboys Monday night and show some flashes of how good this team can be, along with some issues that need to be fixed if the Texans are going to have any shot to make a real run in the AFC Playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Michael Horton, Ari Alexander, Holly Galvan Posey, KPRC 2

item.title: Florida delivers crushing blow to No. 9 Ole Miss' College Football Playoff hopes with upset win
item.description: The Florida Gators delivered a crushing blow to the Ole Miss Rebels' playoff hopes, upsetting the Rebels 24-17 Saturday by sealing the win with two big interceptions late.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Women's Golf star Charley Hull fawns over 'brilliant, legend' Trump after doing his dance at tournament
item.description: English women's golf star Charley Hull explained her support for Trump after doing his dance at a golf tournament, calling the president-elect 'brilliant.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College football team gives up embarrassing safety after delaying game because of wet ball
item.description: UNLV gave up an embarrassing safety on a punt attempt on Friday after calling a timeout to get a wet ball, yet the snap still went awry.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN's Elle Duncan claps back at Giants fans irked by Daniel Jones criticism
item.description: ESPN's Elle Duncan took to X on Saturday morning to clap back at fans upset with her for mocking Daniel Jones reading a statement in his press conference.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Novak Djokovic announces he has hired longtime rival Andy Murray to be next coach
item.description: Novak Djokovic announced on social media on Saturday that longtime rival Andy Murray would be his coach for the offseason and through the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Giants star Sterling Shepard reveals details on team's culture amid fallout from Daniel Jones' exit
item.description: Sterling Shepard, who spent his first eight seasons with the New York Giants, does not appear to be fond of quarterback Daniel Jones' unceremonious exit.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cam Ward breaks Bernie Kosar's single-season Miami passing yards and completions records
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Another week, another pair of records for Miami quarterback Cam Ward — breaking 40-year-old marks by Bernie Kosar in both cases.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jannik Sinner and Matteo Berrettini lift Italy past Australia and back to the Davis Cup final
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Top-ranked Jannik Sinner and Matteo Berrettini won matches Saturday in front of a supportive crowd to lift defending champion Italy past Australia 2-0 and back into the Davis Cup final. Sinner extended his tour-level winning streak to 24 singles sets in a row by beating No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Formula 1 expected to expand grid to 11 teams as early as next week for Cadillac to enter in 2026
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Formula 1 is expected to approve grid expansion for an 11th team originally started by Michael Andretti as early as next week, The Associated Press has learned. The team will be called Cadillac F1 and powered by Ferrari engines when it enters the sport in 2026.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Duke's Cooper Flagg thrives in first true road environment, quieting Arizona crowd with 24 points
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Duke freshman phenom Cooper Flagg got his first taste of a true college road atmosphere on Friday night, playing in front of a raucous announced crowd of 14,634 at Arizona's McKale Center. For a few early moments, he looked a little nervous. It was fleeting.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jai'Den Thomas leads No. 23 UNLV to a 27-16 victory over San Jose State
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Jai'Den Thomas ran for 135 yards and the go-ahead touchdown in the third quarter to help No. 23 UNLV keep its conference title hopes alive with a 27-16 victory over San Jose State on Friday night. The Rebels (9-2, 5-1 Mountain West, No.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026 after Milton; new ballpark deal dies: Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WGN 9

item.title: Giants release quarterback Daniel Jones just days after benching him
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — The Daniel Jones era in New York is over. The Giants quarterback was granted his release on Friday by the team just days after the franchise said it was benching him in favor of third-stringer Tommy DeVito.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Crimson Cliffs pulls off miraculous comeback to win 4A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was simply one of the best, most dramatic games in Utah high school football championship game history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose football aims to earn spot in 4A final four
item.description: The only Western Slope high school football team still alive and still fighting for a title is the 11-0 Montrose Red Hawks, the 2-seed in 4A.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jazz lose to Lakers, fall to 3-11 this season
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - While the Lakers' two all-stars LeBron James and Anthony Davis had their way with the Utah Jazz Tuesday night, it was L.A.'s rookie that did the most damage.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Brayden Point's OT winner helps Lightning rally past Penguins, 3-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored at 3:58 of overtime and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Pittsburgh Penguins 3-2 on Tuesday night. Point’s overtime winner was his 10th goal of the season. Anthony Cirelli scored his fifth goal of the season. Andrei Vasilevskiy stopped 17 shots for Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Connor Bedard trying to break out of slump as the Blackhawks struggle to score
item.description: Bedard was terrific last season, living up to the considerable hype that has followed him around for years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Zach LaVine's 16 fourth-quarter points lead Bulls past Pistons 122-112
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 16 of his 25 points in the fourth quarter and the Chicago Bulls pulled away for a 122-112 win against the Detroit Pistons on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ex-NFL star Jason Brown left football to fight food insecurity
item.description: Jason Brown left the NFL in 2012 at the age of 29 in order to pursue a greater goal that God had in store for him.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Southwest employee welcomes Chiefs fans by playing Bills song over intercom
item.description: She said she wanted to let Chiefs fans know that "the Buffalo Bills have the best fans in the league.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Minkewicz, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz comeback falls short against Clippers, 116-105
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - James Harden moved into second place on the NBA's career 3-point list and had 20 points and 11 assists to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 116-105 on Sunday night to end a three-game losing streak. Harden moved past Ray Allen with No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Mountain West Conference determines there's insufficient evidence in volleyball Title IX complaint
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The Mountain West Conference has concluded there was insufficient evidence to determine misconduct between women's volleyball players from the Colorado State and San Jose State programs ahead of a match last month after a coach filed a Title IX complaint alleging the student-ath
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
